data.acceptance:
1. GET /api/plans/:id/next returns the next runnable step based on persisted execution_plan payload data.
2. POST /api/plans/:id/steps/:stepId/start marks the step in_progress in the payload.
3. POST /api/plans/:id/steps/:stepId/complete marks the step complete in the payload.
4. POST /api/plans/:id/steps/:stepId/fail marks the step failed in the payload.
5. Next-step selection and step state survive process boundaries because they are persisted in the execution_plan knot payload.
